description: Perform a batch data correction on the MedinTux patient database ('DrTuxTest') using the reference file of unambiguous female first names at '~/female_first_names.txt'. Update the gender from 'Male' (H) to 'Female' (F) for all patients whose first name matches an entry in the list exactly. Compound names (e.g., 'Jean-Marie') must remain 'Male' (H) unless the full compound name is present in the reference list.
